ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating the stock's volatility relative to the market */,
  "last_trading_date" TEXT /* Last date the stock traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted close price, which accounts for corporate actions like dividends and splits */,
  "split_factor" REAL /* Factor by which the stock split or reverse split */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on that date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical price data (e.g., exchange, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator entry */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) */,
  "signal_line" REAL /* Signal Line for MACD */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index (RSI) */,
  "atr" REAL /* Average True Range (ATR) */,
  "obv" REAL /* On-Balance Volume (OBV) */,
  "cmf" REAL /* Chaikin Money Flow (CMF) */,
  "stochastic_oscillator" REAL /* Stochastic Oscillator value */,
  "bollinger_bands_upper" REAL /* Upper Bollinger Band value */,
  "bollinger_bands_lower" REAL /* Lower Bollinger Band value */,
  "adx" REAL /* Average Directional Index value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES historical_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry */,
  "buy_signal" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a buy signal is generated */,
  "higher_signal" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a higher signal is generated */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of the signal (e.g., technical, machine learning) */,
  "signal_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the signal */,
  "signal_source" TEXT /* Source of the signal (e.g., algorithm, model) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES historical_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sentiment data (e.g., news, social media) */,
  "sentiment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_category" TEXT /* Category of the sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the sentiment data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_sentiment_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the portfolio */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy used (e.g., growth, value, income) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the portfolio is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the holding */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the holding was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Return percentage of the portfolio */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score of the portfolio */,
  "annualized_return" REAL /* Annualized return of the portfolio */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown of the portfolio */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "investment_experience" TEXT /* Level of investment experience (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume, RSI) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value that triggers the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "triggered" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert has been triggered */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the alert is active */,
  "alert_medium" TEXT /* Medium for the alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "article_type" TEXT /* Type of the article (e.g., earnings report, market update) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the article content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the post was published (e.g., Twitter, Reddit) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the post was published */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the post */,
  "user_handle" TEXT /* User handle of the person who posted */,
  "engagement" TEXT /* Engagement metrics (e.g., likes, comments, shares) */,
  "influencer_score" REAL /* Score indicating the influence of the poster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction model */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date the price is predicted for */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction (e.g., model, expert) */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used for the prediction (e.g., regression, neural network) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES prediction_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the prediction model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., linear regression, neural network) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "last_trained_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last trained */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
